prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流综合类高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第25名（2025年第24名），近年排名稳定在前25，属顶尖高校梯队；2026年声誉评价为明显负面，涉及校园安全、学校管理及录取断档信号；抖音热度总排名第5（高热），短视频曝光量极高，报考关注度持续升温；2025年投档异常信号为低关注，招生情况自2017年以来持续下滑；化学A+、海洋科学A+、生物学A+、统计学A+、应用经济学A、工商管理A、法学A-、数学A-等14个A-及以上学科，学科实力雄厚，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等物理类相关专业为高热推荐，社会热度高；本省物理类考生2021年14.7万→2025年25.0万持续增长，2026年估算约25.1万，竞争基数扩大；厦门大学位于福建省（非本省），在湖北省无特殊地域偏好；该校全国招生以福建、江苏、山东、广东等为主，湖北招生占比约2–3%，属中等偏下水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准16966名、2026年缩招约6.4%使竞争加剧、物理类考生持续增长、声誉负面与抖音高热相互抵消等因素，预计2026年最低位次较2025年略有前移；预测最低位次约16333名，区间15833–16833名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 17580 → 5640 → 16315 → 13728 → 16966, with significant fluctuations in recent years. In 2022, an abnormal low occurred due to adjustments in major groups. From 2023 to 2025, the overall range fluctuated between 13700 and 17000, with a baseline of about 16966 in 2025. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 104 in 2021, 90 in 2022, 104 in 2023, 109 in 2024, and 109 in 2025. In 2026, the plan is 102, a reduction of about 6.4% compared to 2025, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class comprehensive university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it is approximately 25th (24th in 2025), with stable rankings in the top 25 in recent years, belonging to the top-tier university group. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is significantly negative, involving campus safety, school management, and signals of admission gaps. On Douyin, it ranks 5th in overall popularity (high heat), with extremely high short video exposure, and the attention for applications continues to rise. In 2025, the abnormal signal for admission is low attention, with enrollment declining since 2017. It has 14 A- or above disciplines, including A+ in Chemistry, Marine Science, Biology, and Statistics, A in Applied Economics, Business Administration, A- in Law, and Mathematics, indicating strong academic strength and strong appeal for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Physics-related majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are highly recommended with high social popularity. The number of Physics Category candidates in the province grew from 147,000 in 2021 to 250,000 in 2025, with an estimated 251,000 in 2026, expanding the competition base. Xiamen University is located in Fujian Province (not the home province), with no special regional preference in Hubei. The university's national enrollment mainly focuses on Fujian, Jiangsu, Shandong, and Guangdong, with Hubei accounting for about 2–3%, which is at a medium-low level.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline of 16966 in 2025, a reduction of about 6.4% in enrollment in 2026 intensifying competition, continuous growth in Physics Category candidates, and the offsetting effects of negative reputation and high Douyin popularity, the minimum ranking in 2026 is expected to move slightly forward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 16333, with a range of 15833 to 16833.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)

- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Cyberspace Security, Artificial Intelligence, Software Engineering)
- Accounting (including Accounting, Finance, Auditing)

- Mathematics (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science, Statistics).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)

- Engineering Experimental Class (AI and Computer/Integrated Circuits and Electronic Information/Aerospace and Intelligent Manufacturing)
- Physics (Physics, Astronomy)
- Law
- Science Experimental Class (Life Science and Medicine Health/Marine and Ecological Environment).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Chemical Engineering and Materials)
- Civil Engineering (Civil Engineering)
- Chemistry (Chemistry, Energy Chemistry, etc.)
- Energy and Power (New Energy Science and Engineering, Energy Storage Science and Engineering)
- Clinical Medicine/Preventive Medicine.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 15833 to 16833, it is recommended to primarily apply for Tier 2 majors, use Tier 1 majors as a reach, and Tier 3 majors as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 15800), you can focus on reaching for top majors like Statistics and Computer Science in Tier 1. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 16800), you should mainly apply for Tier 2 Engineering Experimental Class and Science Experimental Class, with Tier 3 Chemical Engineering and Materials as a stable safety.

The predicted minimum ranking is about 2816, with a range of 2415–3217.
